summary: Implement one bounded Stage2 typed widening conversion route foundation: selected tcrv.exec RVV variant -> explicit or pre-realized tcrv_rvv widening conversion body -> RVV provider facts -> TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute -> target artifact validation -> generated-bundle ssh rvv evidence if reachable.

Production widening conversion route support already existed across selected-body realization, provider preflight, conversion dtype-policy target validation, C++ target negative tests, and generated-bundle script. Implemented focused evidence closure in test/Target/RVV/pre-realized-selected-body-artifact-widen-i16-to-i32.mlir by adding conversion_kind positive evidence plus stale target-artifact mirror checks for conversion kind, source SEW, destination LMUL, runtime ABI order, operand binding summary, header declarations, and stale dequantization residue.

production_path_result: No production source route change was needed; existing provider/materializer/target/harness path was sufficient after focused proof gaps were closed.
